zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：高位窄幅震荡偏多格局
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD整体维持高位窄幅震荡格局，价格持续贴近日内高点运行，市场波动收敛，短线多头略占优势但上行动能不强，但需关注阻力

技术指标方面MACD柱状维持正值且持续放大，显示多头趋势仍在延续，但RSI指标缺失导致短线超买与否判断存在不确定性风险仍存+变化

支撑位重点关注1717附近SMA20均线支撑区域，下方1700为强支撑防守位，上方1732构成短线关键阻力带压力集中

操作上建议以区间震荡思路为主，回踩1717附近支撑可分批低吸布局，若放量突破1732则有望打开上行空间并顺势跟进机会增强

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently exhibiting a tight consolidation phase following a marginal upward drift, with price action compressed between recent intraday extremes. The market structure suggests a neutral-to-slightly bullish bias as price holds above the 20-period SMA. However, momentum remains muted, indicating indecision rather than a strong directional breakout. Overall trend can be characterized as sideways with a constructive undertone as buyers defend lower bounds.

Momentum indicators present a mixed but mildly constructive picture. The MACD line at 17.77 remains positive, suggesting underlying bullish momentum, though the absence of a signal line limits crossover interpretation. RSI data is unavailable, reducing overbought/oversold clarity. Price trading above the SMA(20) at 1717.65 reinforces short-term support, yet flat price behavior indicates weakening directional conviction and potential consolidation continuation. Volatility remains compressed across intraday sessions, favoring range conditions.

Immediate support is defined by the intraday low at 1728.05, which is closely aligned with current trading levels and may be tested repeatedly in a low-volatility environment. A deeper support zone is found at the 20-period SMA near 1717.65. On the upside, resistance is established at 1731.62, with a breakout above potentially opening room toward the 1740 psychological area and short-term range expansion.

Trading strategy favors range-bound approaches given the compressed volatility and lack of strong directional confirmation. Traders may consider accumulating near the 1728 support area with tight risk control below the SMA(20) at 1717.65. Profit-taking can be staged near 1731 resistance and partial extension toward 1740 on breakout. Until MACD signal alignment or volatility expansion occurs, aggressive trend-following positions remain less favorable.
